creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 237967
Patch file

Update to 1.32.0.

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/certbot/certbot/blob/v1.32.0/certbot/CHANGELOG.md

* Build of all updated ports succeeds with poudriere and 13.1-RELEASE amd64 jail.
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-acme test`: "291 passed, 1 warning".
* Result of `make -C /usr/ports/security/py-certbot test`: "991 passed, 28 skipped, 491 warnings".
